functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Black Bear Guide
pages:
Black Bear Guide

A Choascraft guide for black bear facts, redwood behavior, drops, armor, claws, and netherite upgrades.

Fact 1

Black bears are adaptable omnivores. They eat berries, nuts, insects, fish, carrion, and other foods.

Fact 2

Black bears are often good climbers. Claws help them grip bark and tear into food sources.

Fact 3

Their coat color can vary in real life, but Choascraft separates this bear as the black bear line.

Fact 4

Bears avoid wasting energy when food is scarce, but they can move quickly when threatened.

Choascraft Black Bears

Black bears live in the redwood wilds. They are tempted by salmon but cannot currently be tamed.

Combat

Black bears hit hard and use stomp attacks. Fighting one without gear is a short lesson.

Drops

Black bears drop Bear Raw Meat, Black Bear Fur, and Bear Claw items.

Food

Bear Raw Meat can be cooked into Bear Cooked Meat. Rotten meat comes from zombie bears.

Black Bear Gear

Black Bear Fur and Bear Claw items craft black bear armor and black bear claws.

Crafting

Craft Black Bear Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots, and Black Bear Claws from bear parts. Recipes are in the bear recipe folder.

Bear Claws

Bear Claw items repair bear gear and support claw equipment recipes.

Netherite Bear Gear

Upgrade black bear armor with smithing recipes to make Black Netherite Bear gear.

Field Note

If the forest goes quiet, count your salmon and step carefully.
